CustomField.description: Identifies the user who marked the event as closed. [LOAD:No] [JUSTIFICATION:Contract Diary records are not data-loaded. They are created through a scheduler/flow.] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Automatically populated when Event Status = Closed.
CustomField.label: Completed By
